title: helichrysum stoechas var. maritimum
intro: Helichrysum stoechas var. maritimum, also known as the Corsican orzo or French silver ragwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum stoechas var. maritimum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
